parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter in a physical environment with natural lighting and movements. The interactions with the smartphone are practical and realistic.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s female, slim build, medium complexion. Straight dark brown hair past shoulders, wearing black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Bright pink button-down shirt, light blue jeans. Gold necklace, gold bracelet, watch, and a small lapel microphone.

scenes.setting: A room with dark grey soundproofing foam on the walls and a light wooden bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a room with dark grey soundproofing foam on the walls. A light-colored wooden bookshelf is visible behind her to the right. She holds a black smartphone in her left hand. She gestures actively with her right hand while speaking directly to the camera. The camera slightly tracks her movements.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter stands in a studio setting, introducing the app's concept. She holds a smartphone and gestures while speaking directly to the camera.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: दोस्तों, अगर आपकी उम्र भी 40 साल से ज्यादा हो गई है, [Friends, even if you are over 40 years old,]
Character A says: तो भी आप 7 दिन के अंदर ही अंदर अंग्रेजी बोलना सीख सकते हो। [you can still learn to speak English within 7 days.]
Character A says: ये मेरी गारंटी है। ये देखो। [This is my guarantee. Look at this.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a black smartphone held by a person's left hand. The hand has red nail polish on the fingernails. The phone's screen is illuminated, displaying a solid purple background with a lighter, glowing circular gradient in the center. The background is slightly out of focus, showing dark grey soundproofing foam.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shows the smartphone screen displaying the app's voice translation interface. The user speaks a Hindi phrase, which the app processes and translates into English text and audio.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: मुझे अंग्रेजी सीखना है। [I want to learn English.]
App Voice says: I want to learn English. [I want to learn English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Listening...
Main sun rahi hoon...
Bolo kya translate karna hai
हिंदी
मुझे अंग्रेजी सीखना है
English
I want to learn English
Tap to Copy
Ye sentences bhi try kare
Mujhe English bolni aani chahiye
Main English seekh raha hoon
Mujhe English pe kaam karna hai
Retry

scenes.setting: A room with dark grey soundproofing foam on the walls and a light wooden bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is back in frame, standing in front of the soundproofed wall and wooden bookshelf. She holds the smartphone in her left hand and gestures with her right hand, pointing towards the phone. She looks directly at the camera with a smile.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is shown again in a medium shot, smiling and emphasizing the app's ease of use. She gestures towards the phone, encouraging viewers to try it.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: देखा? बस हो गया। [See? That's it.]
Character A says: ऐसे ही आप भी अपनी भाषा की मदद से अंग्रेजी बोलना सीख सकते हो। [Just like this, you too can learn to speak English with the help of your own language.]
Character A says: और अभी प्ले स्टोर पे जाओ [And go to the Play Store right now]

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot shows a black smartphone held in a person's left hand. The fingernails are painted with red polish. The phone screen is on, displaying a dark-themed interface with various rectangular sections and a prominent button. The background is blurred, revealing a hint of a wooden structure and dark grey soundproofing foam.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up of the smartphone screen displays the app's listing on the Google Play Store. The 'Install' button is visible, serving as the final call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: और ये वाला ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [and download this app.]
